privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openclinica_env site_closeout_and_archival task by confirming that the site 'CV-BHI-001' and subjects 'CV-BHI-101' and 'CV-BHI-102' are synthetically generated and explicitly injected into the OpenClinica database via setup_task.sh PostgreSQL queries. Verified that all target export paths (for the casebook PDFs and XML data) exactly match the task description instructions and export_result.sh validation checks. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because verifier.py is entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable.
